title: Craftable Bedrock-bedrock recipe
description: A mod that lets you craft bedrock.
body:
This mod adds a way to craft bedrock in Minecraft.

You spawn in with a book called "mod manual" which tells you the recipe to craft bedrock!

## <font color="green">**Please share with your friends!!!**</font>

<u>**When we hit 3k total downloads between Curseforge and Modrinth, I will launch my new mod: craftable command blocks, trust me it will be awsome!**</u>

⚠️ Note for Minecraft 1.12.2 ⚠️

Because of a limitation in MCreator, <font color="red"><u>**the Mod Manual doesn't work in the 1.12.2 version**</u></font> of this mod.

Everything else should still work normally.

Curseforge link: [Click Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/craftable-bedrock-bedrock-recipe)

Thank You :)
